evidence: PDF p. 45 (book numbering; PDF page 25) prints geometric-point bars: X \in \Gamma(\bar{s}, \mathscr{L} \otimes \bar{s})^*, the section of G_{\mathscr{L},\bar{s}} normalizes t_G(\mathbb{G}^2_{m,\bar{s}}). The transcription had dropped the bars. Fixed in both data/fr/chapters/XX.json and 01-transcribed/XX.html.

evidence: Checked against PDF and confirmed the following oddities are in the printed source itself, so left untouched: 'série formelle à coefficients positifs' (p. 32); 'exp(H)' at the end of the u^{-1}wu^{-1} computation in 3.8 (p. 40); 'p_-(x) = f(exp(yY))' and codomain 'G' (not G') for p_+, p_- in 3.11 (p. 42); 'Ker(f_T \circ \alpha')' in 4.4 (p. 44); 'g(t) = (\alpha(t) 0; 0 1)' without p(...) in 5.8 (ii) (p. 48). Where the reprint has evident glyph typos (r(...) for \alpha^*(...), P^*_{-\alpha} for U^*_{-\alpha}, z^1 for z^{-1}), the fr transcription already carries the mathematically correct reading and was kept.
